name: Personal Finance Simulator
short_description: Choose parameters like starting money, wage increase, and yearly inflation. These parameters combined with how you spend and manage your money will determine your financial future! Will you end up rich or get evicted?
detailed_description:
In Personal Finance Simulator, you choose parameters like starting money, wage increase, and yearly inflation. These parameters combined with how you spend and manage your money will determine your financial future! Will you end up rich or get evicted?

Hopefully, you will end up rich by age 65. There are various things you can do to increase your chances of a successful outcome. You can live within your means as you let your savings build up. You can invest your savings into different levels of risk/reward. With favourable circumstances and good decisions, you can become a multimillionaire!

You can give yourself a real challenge with certain parameters! A low wage increase or high yearly inflation can make it hard to reach retirement before getting evicted. Your chosen profession and which city you live in also has a big impact on your financial outcome.

Although you're trying to end up rich, the point of the game is to simulate a customized lifestyle. In addition to the starting parameters, you choose housing, groceries, shopping, and travel. See how feasible your lifestyle is based on starting parameters, different professions, and different cities!
